message: Project owner requested continuation, GitHub publication, and a competition/repository/roadmap assessment.
Root self-scan scored 37/100 and incorrectly inherited SIMULATED mode plus fixture auth/payment risks.
User-provided GitHub destination and publication request recorded; protected source repositories remain forbidden.
Correct explicit simulation/staleness detection, isolate configured fixtures, add substantive root governance evidence, verify, then publish.
Post-hardening full verification and GitHub-hosted CI have not run at this checkpoint.
Corrected scanner scope/simulation/staleness false positives, score integrity, Mission Prompt authorization, backup symlink handling, and dashboard evidence fallbacks.
Root self-scan returned REAL_LOCAL_SCAN, 100/100 structural governance readiness, zero risks, zero missing surfaces, and visible fixture exclusions.
GitHub publication, hosted CI, final sanitized media, published Devpost rules review, deployment, provider, load, accessibility, and independent security checks remain unobserved.
npm.cmd run verify passed: nine CLI/core scripts, five dashboard adapter tests, 25-to-88 demo, dependency audit, and Vite build.
Release commit e0ee256e7eb497cd6293fe51f51899645ee3ed90 pushed to the approved origin/main; local and remote SHAs matched.
GitHub Actions workflow run 29208503014 completed successfully for the release commit; all verify job steps passed.
